description_long: This street food stall features a robust metal frame with a curved, translucent canopy providing shelter over the main counter area. The front panel is decorated with a bold red sign reading 'CHILLI DOGS BEST IN SA' in large, playful yellow and white letters. The countertop is metallic and houses a grill, two covered food trays, condiment bottles, and a raised serving shelf. The rear side includes control knobs and access panels, suggesting built-in cooking equipment. The overall structure is utilitarian, with exposed metal surfaces and a practical layout for efficient food preparation and service. The stall is designed for street-side operation, offering both visibility and accessibility to customers.
description: A metal-framed street food stall with a curved canopy, bold 'CHILLI DOGS' signage, and a functional serving counter equipped with cooking and condiment stations.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the 'CHILLI DOGS' sign, condiment bottles, grill, and raised serving shelf.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the full width of the counter, signage, and condiment placement.
description_view_2: Side angled view revealing the depth of the counter, condiment bottles, and food trays.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying control knobs, access panels, and the back of the cooking equipment.
attribute_signage: Large red sign on the front panel with bold yellow and white text reading 'CHILLI DOGS BEST IN SA', styled in playful, rounded letters.
attribute_serving_counter: A wide, metallic counter with a raised serving shelf, condiment bottles, and integrated cooking equipment; the surface is flat and spacious for food preparation and serving.
attribute_food_display: Food is displayed in covered metal trays and on the grill, with condiments placed openly on the counter for easy access; no protective glass shield is present.
attribute_architectural_style: industrial metal frame with a utilitarian street kiosk design
